title: Intense Dense Irish Potato Gratin
description: A rich and creamy Irish dish featuring clotted cream and miso-marinated potatoes, perfect for a midnight craving. This vegan-friendly version is served on a traditional talavera plate.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, olive oil, garlic, thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced potatoes to the bowl and toss to coat with the miso marinade.
In a separate bowl, whip the clotted cream until smooth.
In a talavera plate, create a layer of potatoes.
Top the potatoes with a layer of clotted cream.
Repeat the layers until all ingredients are used, ending with a layer of clotted cream.
Bake the gratin in the preheated oven for 45 minutes.
Remove the gratin from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
